mapper.select: SELECT u.user_code , u.company_id , u.login_id , u.password , u.user_name , u.email , u.phone_number , u.approval , u.create_date , u.status , u.profile_image , u.owner_yn , u.admin_yn , u.web_notification_yn , u.email_notification_yn , u.notification_area , u.last_login_time , g.group_id , r.role_id , r.role_name FROM users u LEFT JOIN groups g ON u.group_id = g.group_id LEFT JOIN roles r ON r.company_id = u.company_id AND ( (u.admin_yn = 1 AND r.role_id = 1) OR (NVL(u.admin_yn, 0) = 0 AND r.role_id = 2) ) ORDER BY u.user_code ASC
